FitzRoy.text:
Wind
In north, westerly or northwesterly 3 or 4, occasionally 5 at first in north. In south, northerly or northwesterly 4 to 6, occasionally 7 at first in southeast, becoming variable 2 to 4 in northwest.
Sea state
In north, moderate or rough, becoming moderate later. in south, moderate or rough.
Weather
In north, showers. In south, rain later in west.
Visibility
In north, good. In south, good, occasionally moderate later in west.
